channel.title: deadpubs TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from deadpubs

item.title: The best-looking new pubs I visited this year (plus some old favourites refurbished in N16 in the honourable mentions). Didn’t get out of London much — this will all be rectified in 2026 as Dead Pubs gets bigger, better, and longer. Thanks for watching th
item.description: The best-looking new pubs I visited this year (plus some old favourites refurbished in N16 in the honourable mentions). Didn’t get out of London much — this will all be rectified in 2026 as Dead Pubs gets bigger, better, and longer. Thanks for watching th

item.title: Help support us (and get loads of cool, exclusive stuff) for less than the price of a pint in our fair capital.

item.title: Here’s the last clip from the long form episode on Holloway. Check it out on YouTube. We’ve been taking a brief break to work on our busy day jobs, but new, exciting DP bits coming imminently.
item.description: Here’s the last clip from the long form episode on Holloway. Check it out on YouTube. We’ve been taking a brief break to work on our busy day jobs, but new, exciting DP bits coming imminently.
